docs:
# Grid Pattern
Low-contrast grids or dots for grounded surfaces and hero backdrops.
## Import
```tsx
import { GridPattern } from "@/components/ui/grid-pattern";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<GridPattern variant="grid" fade fill={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **variant** (string) — default: `"grid"`: Variant
- **fade** (boolean) — default: `true`: Fade mask
- **fill** (string): Fill
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add grid-pattern
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/grid-pattern
```
